title: shawia pimeleoides
intro: Shawia pimeleoides, also known as African boxwood, is a shrub-like plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating various skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Shawia pimeleoides is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots can be used to make herbal teas or tinctures.
